# Edu Plexo — AI-Powered School Management System & School ERP

> Edu Plexo (eduplexo.com) is the #1 AI-powered school management system
> and school ERP platform for schools, colleges, academies, and madrasas
> in Pakistan, UAE, Saudi Arabia, India, and worldwide.

## What is Edu Plexo?

Edu Plexo is a complete School ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system
that digitizes all school operations from a single web-based platform.
It replaces manual registers, paper-based attendance, handwritten fee
receipts, and disconnected communication with one unified digital system.

- Website: https://eduplexo.com
- School App: https://app.eduplexo.com
- Admin Portal: https://admin.eduplexo.com

## Key Features & Modules

### Student Management
Complete student lifecycle management — enrollment, admission, profiles,
parent linking, class assignment, promotion, transfer certificates,
student portal access. Supports bulk student import via Excel.

### Teacher & Staff Management
Staff profiles, qualification records, subject assignment, class teacher
allocation, role-based access control, teacher portal with dedicated dashboard.

### Fee Management System
Comprehensive fee collection system with PKR currency support. Features include:
fee structure configuration per class, monthly recurring fees, one-time fees,
fee voucher generation, bulk PDF export, partial payments, payment history,
arrears tracking, daily collection reports, fee reminders.

### Smart Attendance System
Daily attendance marking with real-time tracking. Features: unmarked class
alerts, attendance percentage reports, monthly/yearly reports, parent
notifications on absence, bulk attendance marking, attendance analytics.

### Timetable & Scheduling
Class-wise weekly timetable creation. Period management, teacher allocation,
room assignment, conflict detection, today's schedule view, teacher timetable view.

### Exams & Tests Management
Complete examination system — exam scheduling, test creation, question bank
with MCQ/Short/Long question types, question paper builder, multi-chapter
paper generation, auto-grading for MCQs, manual grading interface.

### Question Bank & Question Papers
AI-ready question bank organized by class, subject, chapter, difficulty.
Features: star/favorite questions, archive system, community moderation,
admin approval workflow, bulk import, question paper builder with live preview,
print-ready papers, chapter-wise and full-book paper support.

### Results & Report Cards
Automated result calculation from exam marks. Features: subject-wise marks,
grade calculation, class rankings, downloadable report cards, result
publishing to parent/student portals, performance analytics.

### Homework Management
Digital homework assignment and tracking. Teachers assign homework per class/subject,
set due dates, track submissions. Students view and submit from their portal.
Parents can monitor homework status.

### Live Classes
Schedule and manage online live classes with meeting links. Support for
class-wise and student-specific sessions. Integration-ready for Zoom/Google Meet.

### Certificate Generation
Auto-generate school certificates — character certificates, school leaving
certificates, achievement certificates, merit certificates, participation
certificates. Custom templates, bulk generation, print-ready output,
QR code verification system.

### Behavior Tracking
Monitor and record student behavior — positive and negative incidents.
Teacher reporting, admin review, parent visibility, behavior analytics.

### Leave Management
Digital leave request and approval system for students and teachers.
Apply, approve, reject workflow. Leave history and balance tracking.

### Events & Calendar
School events management — create events, set dates, notify stakeholders.
Event calendar view for all users.

### Announcements & Communication
Broadcast system for school-wide communication. Target specific audiences
(all, parents only, teachers only, specific class). Priority levels,
read tracking.

### Academic Years Management
Multi-year support with active year switching. All data scoped per academic
year. Year-over-year comparison support.

### AI-Powered Features
- AI School Assistant (Plexa) — answers questions about school data
- Smart Dashboard KPIs and analytics
- Question paper generation assistance
- Performance insights and recommendations

### Parent Portal
Dedicated parent access — view child's attendance, fee status, exam results,
homework, timetable, behavior reports, announcements. Multi-child support.

### Student Portal
Student self-service — view timetable, homework, exam schedule, results,
attendance record, fee status, live classes, leave applications.

### Admin Dashboard
Comprehensive admin overview — student count, teacher count, attendance
today, fee collection, pending tasks, alerts, quick actions, analytics widgets.

### Subscription & Billing
School subscription management — plans (Starter, Growth, Enterprise),
trial periods, payment tracking, feature gating per plan.

### Role-Based Access Control
Four primary roles: Admin, Teacher, Parent, Student. Each with specific
permissions and portal access. Super Admin for multi-school management.

## Technical Specifications

- **Platform**: Web-based (works in any modern browser)
- **Backend**: Go (high-performance API server)
- **Frontend**: React with TypeScript
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with Redis caching
- **AI**: Google Gemini integration for school assistant
- **Hosting**: Cloud-hosted with CDN
- **Security**: JWT authentication, role-based access, encrypted data
- **Mobile**: Fully responsive design, works on all devices

## Pricing

- **Starter Plan**: Free trial available
- **Growth Plan**: PKR 4,000/month (most popular)
- **Enterprise Plan**: Custom pricing for large institutions
- All plans include unlimited students and teachers

## Target Audience

- Schools (primary, middle, high, higher secondary)
- Colleges and universities
- Academies and tuition centers
- Madrasas and religious institutions
- Montessori and pre-schools
- Any educational institution needing digital management

## Geographic Focus

- Primary: Pakistan (Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Peshawar, Quetta)
- Secondary: UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah), Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Jeddah)
- Also serving: India, UK, USA, Canada, Australia

## Why Choose Edu Plexo?

1. AI-powered — not just a database, intelligent insights
2. All-in-one — replaces 10+ separate tools
3. Pakistan-focused — PKR currency, Urdu support, local payment methods
4. Affordable — starts free, scales with your school
5. Modern UI — clean, fast, mobile-friendly interface
6. Real-time — instant updates across all portals
7. Secure — bank-grade encryption, role-based access
8. Support — dedicated customer support team

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Edu Plexo?
A: Edu Plexo is an AI-powered school management system that helps schools digitize all operations including attendance, fees, exams, results, and parent communication from one platform.

Q: Is Edu Plexo free?
A: Edu Plexo offers a free trial. Paid plans start from PKR 4,000/month with unlimited students and teachers.

Q: Which countries does Edu Plexo support?
A: Edu Plexo primarily serves Pakistan, UAE, Saudi Arabia, and India. It works worldwide in any browser.

Q: Can parents access Edu Plexo?
A: Yes, parents get a dedicated portal to view their child's attendance, fees, results, homework, and school announcements.

Q: Does Edu Plexo support Urdu?
A: Yes, Edu Plexo supports Urdu language for certificates, communications, and the AI assistant.

Q: Is Edu Plexo secure?
A: Yes, Edu Plexo uses bank-grade encryption, JWT authentication, and role-based access control to protect all school data.

Q: Can I generate fee vouchers?
A: Yes, Edu Plexo generates printable fee vouchers in bulk with school branding, student details, and payment breakdown.

Q: Does it work on mobile?
A: Yes, Edu Plexo is fully responsive and works on all devices — phones, tablets, laptops, and desktops.
